full_text:
Tang Zhou 唐周
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Tang Zhou (唐周)was born in Jinan. Follower of Zhang Jue. Betrayed his plans to the Han, and got Ma Yuanyi beheaded. Tang Zhou was affiliated with Yellow Scarves and the Han Dynasty.
